# API Documentation Instructions

Use this file for work that writes or updates `docs/api/`.

## Source of truth

- `backend/src/routes/`
- `backend/src/controllers/`
- `backend/src/validators/`
- `backend/swagger.json`
- auth middleware and request validation flow

## Cover

- endpoint purpose
- auth requirements
- request and response shapes
- validation rules
- error behavior and status codes

## Do not confuse with

- backend internal implementation notes
- product narratives
- deployment procedures
